[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100000 2
1 0010000 1
2 0110000 2
3 0001111 4
4 0100010 2
5 0011111 5
6 1101110 5
7 0011011 4

01 1110000 3
12 0011111 5 match 5
23 1101110 5 match 6
34 0011011 4 match 7
45 1101111 6
56 1111111 a
67 0111011 5
70 1101111 6
